full_text:
Hou Xuan 侯選
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hou Xuan (侯選)was born in Hedong. One of Han Sui’s Eight Knights. Surrendered to Cao Cao along with Han Sui. Hou Xuan was affiliated with the Han Sui Dynasty, Zhang Lu, and the Wei Kingdom.
